description:
Introductions:
Are you looking for a practical rack to organize your shoes? If so, this Wood-plastic Board Six Tiers Carved Shoe Rack is highly recommended to you. It adopts wood-plastic board, which is smooth and beautiful. It also features waterproof, damp proof, easy to clean and not easy to become mildewed. With hollow design, it's suitable for many occasions, like living room, hall, study, bedroom, etc. Moreover, it's easy to install with no tool needed. So what are you waiting for? Just take this practical bookshelf home!

Features:
1. Made of high quality wood-plastic board, smooth, sturdy and beautiful
2. It has a long service time, durable in use
3. Waterproof, damp proof and not easy to become mildewed
4. Washable, easy to clean
5. Can be used to place keys, potted plant, shoes, etc
6. Easy to assemble and disassemble
7. Use screws to fix it on the basis of original installation can make it more fix and not easy to fall apart
8. Beautiful hollow design, can coordinate with any style of decoration
9. Well-crafted and high quality


Note:
1.When receiving the goods, please confirm the product according to the listing of instructions. Once you find Less pieces, please provide relevant pictures to contact us. We will deal it in the time.
2.Please install goods with the instruction manual.
3.It is recommended that the installation should not be too tight to adjust easily. After the structure is installed, firm the interface for more stability.

Specifications:
1. Material: Wood-plastic Board    
2. Color: White
3. Dimensions: (16.54 x 9.45 x 38.19)" / (42 x 24 x 96.5)cm (L x W x H)  
4. Board Thickness: 1cm
5. Each Tier's Height: 6.3" / 16cm    
7. Tier Quantity: 6 Tiers        
8. Weight: 7.78 lbs / 3.53 kg 

Package Includes:
1 x Shoe Rack
1 x Bag of Installation Accessories

Notice:
1. Maintenance Method: Rinse directly with water and then wipe with cloth.
2. Attention: The product size is manual measurement, which exist a little error, please refer to the physical object. Please understand!
